qa_pairs.question: What kind of information is recorded on this page?
qa_pairs.answer: This page records changes to job scheduling policies that might affect the behaviour of job submission commands such as `sbatch`, `salloc`, and `srun`.

qa_pairs.question: When were the RAC 2026 accounts and sub-allocations activated for the Fir, Nibi, Narval, and Rorqual clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: RAC 2026 accounts and sub-allocations were activated for Fir and Nibi on 2026-04-06, and for Narval and Rorqual on 2026-04-07.

qa_pairs.question: What are the new requirements for GPU job requests, and when did these changes take effect on the Fir, Nibi, and Rorqual clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: All GPU requests must now specify a GPU model or an instance model, and only one Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) instance may be requested at a time. These changes took effect on Fir and Nibi on 2026-04-06, and on Rorqual on 2026-04-17. These changes are noted as 'coming soon' for Narval.
